title: Norwegian Cream Pudding
description: A rich and silky dessert inspired by traditional Norwegian recipes, featuring almond and creamy pudding.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Gluten-free flour for a gluten-free option

ingredients.name: Norwegian pudding mix
ingredients.notes: Look for a mix specifically labeled as 'Norwegian' for the best flavor

instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the heavy cream, granulated sugar, and almond extract.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture comes to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the mixture has thickened slightly.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the Norwegian pudding mix until well combined.
Add in the softened butter and stir until melted and fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or ramekins.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until set.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of granulated sugar if desired.
